name: navipartner-bc-tools
description: Claude Code plugins for Business Central AL development at NaviPartner

plugins.name: al-id-manager
plugins.description: Get next available AL object IDs, table/tableextension field IDs, and enum/enumextension value IDs

plugins.name: bcdev-cli
plugins.description: BC Dev CLI - download symbols, compile, publish, and test AL apps (auto-downloads for your platform)

plugins.name: bc-devcontainer
plugins.description: Provision BC development containers via the NaviPartner Crane API - create, reuse, restart, and stop environments to develop and test against
